check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.title: Check If Target Is Immersed In Water
check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.description: Whether or not the target should be fully immersed in water for the knockback rules to apply.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filter.description: Filter for the entity type that will be affected by these knockback rules.

horizontal_hit_angle_scale.title: Horizontal Hit Angle Scale
horizontal_hit_angle_scale.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback horizontally based on the attacker's aim direction.

horizontal_power.title: Horizontal Power
horizontal_power.description: Power with which a target should be knocked backwards.

scale_previous_velocity.title: Scale Previous Velocity
scale_previous_velocity.description: Scaling factor to apply to the target's velocity before applying knockback.

scale_with_damage.title: Scale With Damage
scale_with_damage.description: Scaling factor to the magnitude of knockback based on the inverse square of the damage.

vertical_hit_angle_scale.title: Vertical Hit Angle Scale
vertical_hit_angle_scale.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback vertically based on the attacker's aim direction.

vertical_position_angle_scale.title: Vertical Position Angle Scale
vertical_position_angle_scale.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback vertically based on the difference in the attacker's feet position to the target's feet position.

vertical_power.title: Vertical Power
vertical_power.description: Power with which a target should be knocked upwards.

vertical_velocity_cap.title: Vertical Velocity Cap
vertical_velocity_cap.description: Maximum allowed Y velocity after target's knockback rules have been evaluated.
